impact: Provides a daemon-only guardrail and synthetic self-test for constraining retries after four no-accepted-patch rounds to narrow fixture-first JSON replacements without live DevHub sessions or broad contract rewrites.
summary: Add daemon repeated no-accepted-patch prompt guardrail helper
target_task: Task checkbox-71: Task checkbox-66: Add a daemon prompt/preflight guardrail for repeated no-accepted-patch LLM rounds. Keep this to `ppd/daemon/` only and add a synthetic self-test proving that after four consecutive failed or empty proposal rounds, the next prompt asks for one narrow fixture-first file set, requires complete JSON file replacements, and forbids live DevHub sessions or broad contract rewrites. Do not implement the DevHub form-state domain test in this task.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
